flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Carrington College-Sacramento fell 71% between 2009 and 2010 (53.4% → 15.5%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Carrington College-Sacramento rose 45% between 2007 and 2010 ($7.5k → $10.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Carrington College-Sacramento fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Carrington College-Sacramento rose 68% between 2007 and 2010 (1.0k → 1.7k).
